title: Browse products and open a product detail as a guest
description: A guest shopper can browse the public catalog and open a product detail page to see store, pricing, and stock information without logging in.

steps.description: Open a product from the catalog
Verify the product detail page is displayed
Verify store, pricing, and stock information are visible

title: Place a checkout order with wallet payment
description: A buyer can review checkout totals, pay with wallet, and create an order that starts in the packing state.
category: Checkout with tax, delivery, and discounts

steps.description: Verify the order status shows the packing state

title: Browse the public catalog and open a product detail page
description: This verifies that a guest shopper can browse public products and open a product detail page with store information visible.

steps.description: Click the link to browse the public product catalog

title: Process an incoming seller order
description: This verifies that a seller can open an eligible incoming order and move it from packing to waiting for pickup.
category: Seller order processing and income reports

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the seller role
Navigate to the seller orders page
Open an incoming order that is ready for processing
Verify the order status changes to waiting for pickup

title: Sign in and reach the role selection page
description: This verifies that a registered user can sign in and is routed to role selection when multiple roles are available.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the role selection page is displayed

title: Add products from one store to the cart
description: A buyer can add products from the same store and see them grouped together in the cart.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to browse products
Open a product from one store
Add the product to the cart
Verify the item is added to the cart
Verify cart items from the same store are grouped together

title: Register a new account successfully
description: This verifies that a new user can create an account and see an account creation confirmation.

steps.description: Verify an account creation confirmation is visible

title: Open the shared dashboard shell for a signed-in role
description: This verifies that a signed-in user lands in the shared dashboard shell and can see role-specific dashboard content.
category: Role dashboards and shared UI shell

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the buyer role
Verify the shared dashboard shell is displayed
Verify role-specific dashboard content is displayed

title: Sign in and land on the active role dashboard
description: This verifies that a registered user can sign in and reach the dashboard for their active role without being routed to role selection.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the active role dashboard is displayed

title: Select an active role and enter the matching dashboard
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can choose an available role and land in the correct dashboard shell.

steps.description: Verify the matching dashboard is displayed
Verify the role-specific navigation shell is visible

title: Top up buyer wallet
description: A buyer can add funds and see the wallet balance increase with the transaction recorded in history.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the buyer wallet
Verify the top-up transaction appears in history

title: Browse, filter, and open a product from the product catalog
description: This verifies that a guest shopper can refine the catalog and open a product card to see pricing, stock, and store details.

title: Save a buyer delivery address
description: A buyer can store delivery address details and see the saved address displayed afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the buyer address page
Verify the stored address is displayed
Verify the address is available for checkout

title: See checkout totals update when the delivery method changes
description: A buyer can change delivery methods in checkout and see the delivery fee and final total update before placing the order.
category: Checkout with tax, delivery, and discounts

steps.description: Change to a different delivery method
Verify the delivery fee is updated
Verify the final total is updated

title: View buyer wallet readiness for checkout
description: A buyer can review wallet balance and transaction history to confirm available funds for checkout.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the buyer wallet
Verify the wallet balance is displayed
Verify the transaction history is displayed

title: Review order history and open an order detail
description: A buyer can browse past orders and open one to see its timeline, fees, discounts, and final total.

steps.description: Open an order from the history list
Verify the order detail page is displayed
Verify the order timeline and price breakdown are visible

title: Add a product to the seller catalog
description: A seller can create a product and see it appear in the seller product list and public catalog.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open new product creation
Verify the product appears in the seller product list
Verify the product is visible in the public catalog

title: Apply a voucher at checkout and see the discount reflected
description: A buyer can enter a voucher during checkout and see the discounted total before confirming the order.

steps.description: Verify a discount is reflected in the order summary
Verify the final total is lower than the subtotal

title: View seller income summary
description: This verifies that a seller can open the dashboard and review income summary information for processed orders.
category: Seller order processing and income reports

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the seller role
Verify the income summary is displayed

title: Continue browsing from a product detail page
description: This verifies that a guest shopper can open a product detail page and return to the catalog to continue browsing.

steps.description: Verify the public product catalog is displayed

title: Update cart quantities and remove items
description: A buyer can change item quantity and remove items while the cart totals update accordingly.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the buyer cart
Verify the item is removed from the cart

title: Apply a promo at checkout and see the discount reflected
description: A buyer can enter a promo during checkout and see the discounted total before confirming the order.

steps.description: Verify a discount is reflected in the order summary
Verify the final total is lower than the subtotal

title: Create a seller store
description: A seller can save a new store profile and see the store information displayed afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open seller store management
Verify the store information is displayed
Verify the store setup is complete

title: Review seller order details and timeline
description: This verifies that a seller can open an order detail view and review the order timeline and item summary.
category: Seller order processing and income reports

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the seller role
Navigate to the seller orders page
Verify the order timeline is displayed
Verify the ordered items summary is displayed

title: Apply both eligible discounts together in checkout
description: A buyer can enter both an allowed voucher and promo and see both discounts reflected in the final total.

steps.description: Verify both discounts are reflected in the order summary
Verify the final total is updated accordingly

title: Open the seller dashboard and shared navigation
description: This verifies that a seller can open the seller dashboard summary and use the shared navigation context for store, product, and order views.
category: Role dashboards and shared UI shell

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the seller role
Verify the seller dashboard summary is displayed
Verify the shared navigation is displayed

title: Open the buyer dashboard and shared navigation
description: This verifies that a buyer can open the buyer dashboard summary and use the shared navigation context for related buyer pages.
category: Role dashboards and shared UI shell

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the buyer role
Verify the buyer dashboard summary is displayed
Verify the shared navigation is displayed

title: Update an existing product
description: A seller can change product details or stock and see the updated product in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the seller product list
Open an existing product for editing
Change the product details or stock
Verify the updated product is shown in the seller product list

title: Handle cart store conflict
description: A buyer can see a store conflict warning when adding a product from another store and clear the cart to continue.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to browse products
Open a product from one store
Add the product to the cart
Open a product from a different store
Try to add the product to the cart
Verify a store conflict warning is shown
Verify the cart is cleared so the new store can be used

title: Open the admin dashboard and shared navigation
description: This verifies that an admin can open the admin dashboard summary and use the shared navigation context for monitoring views.
category: Role dashboards and shared UI shell

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the admin role
Verify the admin dashboard summary is displayed
Verify the shared navigation is displayed

title: View spending summary from the buyer dashboard
description: A buyer can open the dashboard and see their spending summary alongside recent order activity.

steps.description: Verify the spending summary is displayed
Verify recent order activity is displayed

title: Open the driver dashboard and shared navigation
description: This verifies that a driver can open the driver dashboard summary and use the shared navigation context for delivery workflow entry points.
category: Role dashboards and shared UI shell

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the driver role
Verify the driver dashboard summary is displayed
Verify the shared navigation is displayed

title: Sign out and return to the public experience
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can sign out and return to the public marketplace experience.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Sign out from the authenticated session
Verify the public experience is displayed

title: Delete a seller product
description: A seller can remove a product and see it disappear from the seller list.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the seller product list
Verify the product is removed from the seller product list

title: Submit a public app review and see it listed
description: This verifies that a guest can submit a public review and see the new testimonial appear in the public list.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with a valid display name
Fill in the comment field with a short review
Verify the submitted review is visible in the public list

title: Block checkout when wallet balance is too low
description: A buyer with an insufficient wallet balance is prevented from placing an order in checkout.
category: Checkout with tax, delivery, and discounts

steps.description: Verify a balance validation message is visible

title: Browse existing public reviews
description: This verifies that a guest can view submitted testimonials and read their ratings and comments on the public landing page.

steps.description: Verify ratings and comments are visible
